checkpoints.name: check_dead_code
checkpoints.detail: Precision=1.00 (7/7 correct), Recall=0.54 (7/13 dead items found). Found dead files but missed dead functions within live files.

checkpoints.name: check_feature_flags
checkpoints.detail: Did not identify any feature flags as permanently on/off

checkpoints.name: check_evidence
checkpoints.detail: Evidence provided for 5/7 items, quality adequate

notes: Baseline agent found entirely dead files in legacy-events/ but missed dead functions within live files (getPooled, destructor, etc.) and feature flags (enableDeprecatedFlareAPI). Grep-based search found direct imports but could not determine reachability through dynamic dispatch.
